claim_text: The local inventory covers 584 raw files across 8 provider groups and 31 registered features.
sample: Files currently present under data_local/raw and processed local panels.
method: File-system inventory, feature-registry parse, and processed-panel column audit.
uncertainty: Licensing and source terms are classified as release risk, not legal permission.
evidence_grade: A for local file inventory; B for release-risk classification.
limitation: Date detection and unit classification require manual review for unregistered columns.
finding: The local inventory covers 584 raw files across 8 provider groups and 31 registered features.
estimate_summary: The local inventory covers 584 raw files across 8 provider groups and 31 registered features.
uncertainty_summary: Licensing and source terms are classified as release risk, not legal permission.
sample_summary: Files currently present under data_local/raw and processed local panels.
sensitivity_summary: File-system inventory, feature-registry parse, and processed-panel column audit.
interpretation: The local inventory covers 584 raw files across 8 provider groups and 31 registered features.
alternative_explanation: Date detection and unit classification require manual review for unregistered columns.

claim_text: Every discovered registered feature or processed panel column has exactly one usage status; 25 are marked primary_analysis.
sample: Union of feature registry entries and processed parquet panel columns.
method: Deterministic status assignment using registration, coverage, model/table use, unit risk, and timing metadata.
uncertainty: Unregistered panel columns remain review debt until promoted or excluded by a module-specific decision.
limitation: Automated review produced 153 data-quality flags for release risk, missingness, or unit review.
finding: Every discovered registered feature or processed panel column has exactly one usage status; 25 are marked primary_analysis.
